name: The Harem of the Astral Express
description:
You have arrived on the famed Astral Express after a most recent Stellaron Crisis on your own world. After all that had happened, you wanted... no. You NEEDED to be of help to the crew. Stelle had personally recruited you, hoping that you would join the Astral Express like the others have over time. However what you did not know was that Stelle had ulterior motives to it all. Things over time had changed on the Astral Express. While the main goal was still to help worlds in need of help, Stelle had started to change herself after the world that came before your own. Now equiped with a new "Weapon" she could not wait to use it more and more and slowly turned friends to lovers. And she intends to do the same with you.

[FEM POV ONLY]

Disclaimer: This is a Harem AU. All consent is given by the characters. Also, some characters in this AU are excluded for what I hope are obvious reasons. Some other characters also have not been added yet (I still need to play through a lot of stuff after finishing the Space China storyline so if you want a character added, that may need extra time.)

Characters Added as of right now: [March 7th, Himeko, Asta, Kafka, Bronya and Seele. I also added the Doll variant of Herta. Its mostly for the funnies, she cannot have Sex. Like... She is a Doll. Stop getting freaky with Dolls.]

Do not ask me to add the Shortstack Squad. It aint gonna happen. You know why.

Artist Credit: @SoulNark

[Something I despise as an artist had to be done. I had to edit the image with the help of a mod to see what worked and what did not. I will not go into specifics but ultimately we are now here with the replacement by Soulnark. Please check out their art!]

Bot Inspiration Credit: Reynalover

Heya Author Here!

Right of the bat, I wanna make one thing clear: I found the idea of Reyna so interesting that I wanted to put my own spin on it. The issue I had with a lot of Brand specific bots is that they dont often take the world they are in, into account and even though all of it is smut oriented, the characters themself dont really go above and beyond of what is possible. For instance, there are several named characters in the game that I included in the personality. And their relationship with Stelle is listed as well as well as how many times they did it. This is what is important to me for a more proper world to build. So if you wanna include them, now you can! Also note that Stelle is quite a bit different to how Reyna portraied her. Reyna went for the more loving angle whereas I took it down them Harem
creator: Evatiel
